CustomObject.description: Outbound lifecycle event published once when a workflow instance reaches a terminal state (Completed, Failed, Compensated, Cancelled). Carries outcome metadata only (not the full payload) so Flows and external subscribers can react event-driven instead of polling Workflow_Instance__c. ContinuedAsNew chains emit exactly one event, on the final successor's terminal transition. Delivery is at-least-once; subscribers dedupe on Workflow_Instance_Id__c + Status__c.
CustomObject.label: Workflow Lifecycle
